title: Wholesome Ginger Agave-Leaf Pilaf
description: A delicious and nourishing pilaf featuring a base of sautéed vegetables with an infusion of ginger and agave leaves. This one-pot dish is perfect for a warm and comforting dinner.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the soğan sofre and sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add the fresh ginger root and continue to cook for another minute.
Stir in the basmati rice and let it toast lightly, about 1 minute.
Pour in the water and bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to low, cover and simmer until the liquid is absorbed, about 20 minutes.
Gently place each agave leaf into the pot with the pilaf mixture, ensuring they are slightly submerged in the liquid.
Simmer for an additional 15-20 minutes or until the rice is tender but still has a bit of bite.
Season with kosher salt to taste.
